name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
  /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", decision |-> "None"]
  /\ messages = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
     /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Prepare", to |-> "All"])
     /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "WaitingForVotes"]
     /\ participants' = participants
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[p].state = "Init"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteYes", to |-> p])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.p.state = "VotedYes", !.p.vote = "Yes"]
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[p].state = "Init"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteNo", to |-> p])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.p.state = "VotedNo", !.p.vote = "No"]
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[p].state = "VotedYes"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", to |-> p])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.p.state = "Committed"]
        /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Committed", !.decision = "Commit"]
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ participants[p].state = "VotedNo"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", to |-> p])
        /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.p.state = "Aborted"]
        /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Aborted", !.decision = "Abort"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: a set of fork indices that are currently free *)
(* State: a mapping from philosopher indices to their state:
   "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

Init ==
  forks = {1, 2, ..., N} /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next ==
  \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "thinking"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
     /\ forks' = forks
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks and starts eating *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks = {i, i+1}
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
     /\ forks' = {}
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks and starts thinking *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "eating"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
     /\ forks' = {i, i+1}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder value *)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = {}
    /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
    \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
